summary: Tested 3 UX improvements: (1) Platform admin Customer creation with Partner Org dropdown, (2) Partner Orgs list shows store_name from Organization Info, (3) TopNav store name updates immediately after saving Organization Info. All 3 features working correctly. Backend: 12/13 tests pass (1 minor test assumption failure, not a bug).

design_issues.screen: Create Customer Dialog - Partner Organization dropdown
issues: One tenant shows as 'Rookie ()' with empty code in the dropdown. This is an unnamed/legacy tenant (same one noted in iteration_260). The code is blank which looks odd in the dropdown display.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate and fix the unnamed/legacy tenant with empty code ('Rookie ()') appearing in Partner Org dropdown in Create Customer dialog. May need to set a proper code or hide codeless tenants from the dropdown.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: GET /api/admin/tenants correctly enriches store_name from app_settings collection using a separate query and map - good implementation.

Frontend CustomersTab.tsx: Platform admin check uses `authUser?.role === 'platform_admin' || authUser?.role === 'platform_super_admin'` which is correct. The tenant_id is passed to the create endpoint only when isPlatformAdmin and createTenantId is set.
Frontend TenantsTab.tsx line ~300: `tenant.store_name || tenant.name` correctly falls back to tenant name when store_name is empty.
WebsiteContext.tsx: The WebsiteSetterContext + useWebsiteUpdate hook properly allows immediate state updates without page refresh. WebsiteTab.tsx calls updateWebsite() after successful save.

The handleCreateCustomer in CustomersTab.tsx requires platform admin to select a tenant (line 225): `if (isPlatformAdmin && !createTenantId) { toast.error('Please select a partner organization'); return; }` - this is correct frontend validation.

success_rate.backend: 92% (12/13 tests pass - 1 minor test assumption failure about automate-accounts not in partner list)

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed customers during backend tests (via API). Created a TEST_PartnerOrg_XXXX partner tenant for partner admin tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 UX improvements are verified working: (1) Platform admin Customer creation dialog shows Partner Org dropdown with store_name-enriched options. (2) Partner Orgs tab (Admin > Partner Orgs) shows store_name from Organization Info as the display name. (3) Admin > Organization Info > Store Name saves and immediately updates the TopNav without page refresh via useWebsiteUpdate() hook. Login: use /api/auth/login with 'automate-accounts' code + email/password for platform admin.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - testing new features, no bugs found
